name: IdsEdwHedisPopDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: with cte_src as (select HEDIS_POP_SK,HEDIS_POP_NM,SRC_SYS_CD,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.HEDIS_POP where LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}), cte_final as (select cte_src.HEDIS_POP_SK as HEDIS_POP_SK, cte_src.HEDIS_POP_NM as HEDIS_POP_NM, cte_src.SRC_SYS_CD as SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte_src.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK as IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK from cte_src) select * from cte_final

PROCESSING:     Populate HEDIS data from GDIT, so the Health Statisticians can create a member scorecard 
                             To generate the load file for EDW table HEDIS_POP_D from IDS table HEDIS_POP.
